title: senecio pensilis
intro: Senecio pensilis, also known as the bush geranium or partridge berry, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio pensilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Senecio pensilis are made into a tea or decoction by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
